creator: novel@FreeBSD.org
text:
> maybe it'd be better to add an option to choose between qemu-devel and qemu (default)

yeah, it looks like qemu is now never that qemu-devel, so we probably can just switch to emulators/qemu or add an option to depend on qemu-devel indeed.

> did you take a look at VNC autoport feature?

yeah, I did, it looks good from the first glance, though it's indeed recommended to send it to the upstream list https://www.redhat.com/mailman/listinfo/libvir-list. Here's a guide on how to get started: http://libvirt.org/hacking.html#patches
